sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ANVS.N Stock News Today | Earnings, Events & Price Alerts
feed.summary: This page provides news and events for ANVS.N, Annovis Bio, including recent corporate announcements, financial reports, and study updates. Key highlights include a partnership with NeuroRPM for Parkinson's disease monitoring, the company's cash and cash equivalents, and positive safety recommendations for its Phase 3 Alzheimer's trial. The content also lists past news articles and upcoming events related to the company's research and financial performance.

Assured Guaranty Ltd, a financial guaranty insurance provider, is currently considered modestly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.84.

feed.title: Aditxt 10-K: Revenue $0.003M, Net loss $42.79M, EPS $(1,153.83)
feed.summary: Aditxt (ADTX) reported a significant financial downturn in its latest 10-K filing, with fiscal year revenue of $0.003 million and a net loss of $42.787 million, resulting in an EPS of $(1,153.83). The revenue decline was primarily due to reduced demand for AditxtScore COVID testing, while the net loss included a substantial fair value loss related to Evofem. The company is facing significant cash burn and vendor delinquencies, raising substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern.

feed.title: Snabe Jim H, c3.ai director, sells $80,800 in shares
feed.summary: C3.ai Director Snabe Jim H. recently sold 10,000 shares of Class A Common Stock for $80,800 while simultaneously purchasing 10,000 shares for $77,300. These transactions adjust Snabe's direct and indirect holdings to 385,000 and 28,000 shares, respectively. The company has faced significant challenges, including missing Q3 fiscal 2026 earnings expectations and concerns over revenue decline, leading several analysts to lower price targets and issue cautious ratings.

feed.title: Director Choong Khuat Leok lists 2,400 Abits Group (ABTS) shares
feed.summary: Abits Group Inc. director, Choong Khuat Leok, has filed an initial ownership report (Form 3) disclosing a direct beneficial ownership of 2,400 Ordinary Shares in the company. This filing establishes his equity stake and indicates no recent purchases, sales, or derivative positions. The report provides transparency regarding his initial holdings in ABTS.

feed.title: First Majestic (AG) posts 2025 Form 40-F with Deloitte attestation
feed.summary: First Majestic Silver Corp. has filed its annual Form 40-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, which includes an Annual Information Form and audited consolidated financial statements. Management, along with the CEO and CFO, confirmed the effectiveness of disclosure controls and internal control over financial reporting as of December 31, 2025, with an explicit exclusion for Gatos Silver, Inc., acquired early in 2025. Deloitte LLP provided an attestation report on internal control dated February 18, 2026, and no clawback recovery was required.

feed.title: Adaptive Biotechnologies (ADPT) president sells $751k in stock
feed.summary: Julie Rubinstein, President and COO of Adaptive Biotechnologies (ADPT), sold 57,180 shares of common stock for approximately $751,302 between March 27 and March 31, 2026. These transactions, executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, followed Rubinstein's exercise of stock options. Despite the sale, the company recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations, and received raised price targets and reiterated positive ratings from several analyst firms.

feed.title: Adaptive Biotech (NASDAQ: ADPT) COO sells 57,180 shares in 10b5-1 plan

These sales, conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on November 18, 2025, followed the exercise of stock options for 44,166 shares. After these transactions, Rubinstein directly holds 455,878 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: Alcoa (NYSE:AA) Short Interest Up 19.6% in March

This rise indicates increased bearish sentiment, with a days-to-cover ratio of 1.1 days. The stock's performance reflects mixed analyst ratings and market volatility, influenced by geopolitical supply shocks and strong quarterly earnings that beat analyst estimates.

feed.title: ABUS Should I Buy
feed.summary: Arbutus Biopharma Corp (ABUS) is not recommended as a strong buy for beginner, long-term investors due to a lack of clear positive momentum, absence of significant trading signals, and unimpressive financial performance. While the company boasts strong liquidity and a significant Q4 2025 revenue increase, it faces challenges with declining net income and EPS, and an ongoing patent dispute with Moderna. Analysts from Jefferies maintain a Buy rating but acknowledge the complexities of the patent case.

feed.title: DSS enters $2.45 million convertible loan agreement with Alset International
feed.summary: DSS, Inc. has announced a $2.45 million convertible loan agreement with Alset International Limited, a subsidiary of Alset Inc., both under the control of Chan Heng Fai. This agreement involves a convertible promissory note with a 3% annual interest rate and a warrant to purchase DSS common stock, conditional on DSS shareholder approval. In separate news, DSS also recently priced a public offering expected to raise approximately $1 million for general corporate and working capital needs.

feed.title: William Blair Maintains Aehr Test Systems(AEHR.US) With Buy Rating
feed.summary: William Blair has reiterated its Buy rating for Aehr Test Systems (AEHR.US). The article does not provide further details or analysis regarding the reasons for maintaining this rating.

feed.title: Archer Aviation (NYSE: ACHR) officer sells 100K shares in 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Archer Aviation's Chief Legal & Strategy Officer, Eric Lentell, sold 100,000 shares of Class A Common Stock under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The sales, totaling approximately $533,000, were executed to cover tax liabilities from a previous restricted stock unit settlement. Following these transactions, Lentell directly holds 50,119 shares and restricted stock units representing rights to an additional 548,955 shares.

feed.title: Zspace Inc. launches Franklin Lab A3 for interactive virtual circuit learning
feed.summary: Zspace Inc. has introduced Franklin Lab A3, a new virtual simulation platform designed to revolutionize the way students learn about electricity. This platform enables users to build, explore, and troubleshoot electrical circuits in a safe digital environment, fostering hands-on engagement with STEM concepts. Franklin Lab A3 aims to advance science education by allowing students to experiment and acquire problem-solving skills without the risks associated with physical experiments.

feed.title: Afya (AFYA) CEO trims holdings with 1,810-share open-market sale
feed.summary: Afya Ltd CEO Gibbon Virgilio Deloy Capobianco reported selling a total of 1,810 Class A Common Shares in open-market transactions on March 27 and March 30, 2026. The sales were made at prices of $15.00 and $14.91 per share, respectively. Following these transactions, the CEO directly holds 151,938 Class A Common Shares and indirectly holds an additional 200,000 shares through GIBBOAT OVERSEAS LTD.

feed.title: ProFrac (NASDAQ: ACDC) CFO logs equity award and tax-related share disposals
feed.summary: ProFrac Holding Corp's Chief Financial Officer, Harbour Austin, reported compensation-related disposals of Class A Common Stock. These transactions involved the disposal of shares to the issuer and for tax withholding, linked to the vesting of restricted stock units and performance-based shares on March 27, 2026. Following these disposals, Austin directly held 100,123 shares of ProFrac Class A Common Stock, with remaining equity awards scheduled to vest in 2027 and 2028.

feed.title: ProFrac (NASDAQ: ACDC) CLO reports equity award-related share disposals
feed.summary: ProFrac Holding Corp.'s CLO, CCO, and Corporate Secretary, Steven Scrogham, reported multiple dispositions of Class A common stock on March 27, 2026. These transactions involved shares returned to the issuer at $6.63 per share and shares disposed of to satisfy withholding taxes, all in connection with vested equity awards. Following these transactions, Scrogham directly holds 83,196 shares of ProFrac Class A common stock.

feed.title: Earnings Call Summary | American Shared Hospital Services(AMS.US) Q4 2025 Earnings Conference
feed.summary: American Shared Hospital Services (AMS) reported a Q4 2025 revenue of $7.7 million, a 14.8% decrease year-over-year, and a full-year net loss of $1.6 million. Despite financial setbacks, the company is expanding its direct patient care service model, establishing new partnerships, and planning treatment centers in Rhode Island and Mexico. Challenges include physician turnover and reimbursement dynamics, but AMS aims for long-term growth through international expansion and operational efficiencies.

feed.title: Craig-Hallum Maintains Amprius Technologies(AMPX.US) With Buy Rating
feed.summary: Craig-Hallum has maintained its Buy rating on Amprius Technologies (AMPX.US). This indicates a continued positive outlook from the firm regarding Amprius Technologies' stock performance.

feed.title: Alaska Air posts Q1 results April 20, then opens webcast April 21
feed.summary: Alaska Air Group (NYSE: ALK) announced it will webcast its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company plans to file its Q1 results and outlook after market close on Monday, April 20, 2026, and will host a conference call and public webcast on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, at 11:30 a.m. EDT / 8:30 a.m. PDT. An archived recording of the call will be made available on its investor relations website later the same morning.

feed.title: Akanda’s FTF Subsidiary Expands Mexican Fiber Network, Secures $2 Million in Long-Term Cash Flow
feed.summary: Akanda Corp.'s subsidiary, First Towers & Fiber Corp. (FTF), expanded its dark fiber network in Central Mexico by 200 km, bringing its total coverage to 900 km. This expansion secured approximately $2 million in 10-year contracted cash flow from existing enterprise customers and strengthens FTF’s presence in the Bajío industrial region. The move is part of Akanda’s strategy to consolidate premium fiber assets across Mexico and build a high-margin digital infrastructure platform.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Yiren Digital ...
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has launched an investigation into Yiren Digital Ltd. (NYSE: YRD) following a significant decline in its stock price. The investigation concerns potential securities fraud or unlawful business practices by Yiren's officers and/or directors, stemming from a reported decline in fourth-quarter revenue, a net loss, and increased delinquent loan rates attributed to regulatory changes, reduced loan facilitation, and a higher-risk asset profile. Investors are encouraged to contact Pomerantz LLP to learn more about joining a potential class action.

feed.title: Alexanders amends Bloomberg lease at 731 Lexington Avenue with rent abatement
feed.summary: Alexanders Inc. has amended its lease agreement with Bloomberg L.P. for the office condominium at 731 Lexington Avenue, New York City. The amendment includes a rent abatement of $56,808,900 for Bloomberg in exchange for a corresponding reduction in Bloomberg's tenant improvement fund. Despite these changes, Bloomberg continues to lease the entire office condominium, and the lease expiration date remains February 8, 2040.

feed.title: [8-K] ALEXANDERS INC Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Alexander's, Inc. (ALX) has filed an 8-K report detailing a material event where it amended Bloomberg L.P.'s long-term lease at 731 Lexington Avenue. The amendment grants Bloomberg a rent abatement of $56,808,900 for April 1 to December 1, 2026, offset by an equivalent reduction in Bloomberg's tenant improvement fund. A related loan agreement was also amended to create a free rent reserve account to cover debt service during the abatement period, ensuring Alexander's cash flow stability.

feed.title: AMC SEC Filings - Amc Entmt Hldgs Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive access to AMC Entertainment Holdings Inc. (AMC) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K forms, and insider trading reports, alongside AI-powered summaries and sentiment analysis. Recent filings highlight director equity grants as part of a compensation program, a significant debt restructuring plan involving new notes and a term loan, and the company's 2025 financial performance showing increased revenue but deeper net losses. AMC also details its heavy debt load and warns of the speculative nature of its common stock, with a recent report indicating Pentwater Capital Management LP has exited its beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Amrize appoints Baris Oran as CFO; Ian Johnston to senior advisor
feed.summary: Amrize has announced the appointment of Baris Oran as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 1, 2026. Ian Johnston, the outgoing CFO, will transition to a senior advisor role and will be on garden leave until March 31, 2027, to support the transition. The change is not related to any disagreements regarding financial controls or operations.

feed.title: Alkermes Shares Surge 15% Following Lilly-Centessa Deal
feed.summary: Alkermes shares surged 15% following Eli Lilly's acquisition of Centessa, driven by market optimism for its sleep disorder prospects and its developing orexin 2 receptor drug. Clinical trial progress for Alkermes' alixorexton showed significant improvements in wakefulness, attracting large pharma interest. RBC Capital assigned an 'Outperform' rating with a $45 price target, while retail investor sentiment shifted from 'neutral' to 'bullish' on Stocktwits.

feed.title: Candescent Enables Tap to Pay on iPhone for Small Businesses at Zions Bancorporation with Autobooks
feed.summary: Candescent has partnered with Zions Bancorporation and Autobooks to introduce Tap to Pay on iPhone for Zions' small business customers. This solution enables secure, in-person, contactless payments directly within the mobile banking experience, eliminating the need for extra hardware. The integration aims to simplify payment acceptance and provide small businesses with a comprehensive view of their finances through existing invoicing, accounting, and cash flow tools within digital banking.

feed.title: ALDX Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALDX) for alleged securities fraud between November 3, 2023, and March 16, 2026. Investors who purchased Aldeyra securities during this period and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their rights and potentially lead the lawsuit. The complaint asserts that Aldeyra made false and misleading statements regarding inconsistencies in clinical trials for its reproxalap drug candidate, causing investor damages.

feed.title: Aldeyra (NASDAQ: ALDX) grants CEO 1.88M options and bonus units
feed.summary: Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALDX) CEO Todd C. Brady was granted 1,880,510 stock options with an exercise price of $1.77 per share and 632,318 bonus units. These awards are part of his compensation package and are subject to vesting schedules contingent on continuous service to the company. The stock options vest monthly over 48 months, and the bonus units vest annually over four years, with the vested units entitling him to a cash payment based on the common stock's closing price.

feed.title: Director-linked funds add 75K Zenas BioPharma (ZBIO) shares at $20 in offering
feed.summary: Entities linked to Zenas BioPharma director Hongbo Lu purchased 75,000 shares of common stock at $20.00 each through an underwritten public offering, bringing their indirect holdings to 422,968 shares. This transaction, detailed in a Form 4 filing, reflects a significant insider buy within Zenas BioPharma (ZBIO). The reporting person disclaims beneficial ownership beyond any pecuniary interest.

feed.summary: 22nd Century Group, Inc. (XXII) has filed a shelf registration statement to offer up to $250 million in various securities, including debt, common stock, preferred stock, warrants, subscription rights, securities purchase contracts, and units. The filing also includes an amendment to its at-the-market (ATM) sales agreement with Needham & Company, LLC, allowing for the sale of up to $1.84 million in common stock. As of March 26, 2026, the company reported 721,338 shares of common stock outstanding at a price of $2.94 per share.

The Form 3 serves as a baseline for future reporting of his ownership changes.

feed.title: YD Bio launches telehealth platform for cancer detection By Investing.com
feed.summary: YD Bio Limited has announced the launch of its EG Telehealth Platform in collaboration with EG BioMed Co., Ltd., expanding cancer detection and monitoring services across 44 U.S. states, Washington, D.C., and Guam. This platform combines YD Bio's digital health infrastructure with EG BioMed's laboratory capabilities to screen for various cancers, including pancreatic, colorectal, liver, gastrointestinal, and breast cancers. The launch is a step towards scalable deployment, coinciding with YD Bio's ongoing plans to merge with EG BioMed and recent acquisitions to enhance its technological capabilities.

feed.title: Exzeo Group (XZO) CEO buys 2,000 shares, holds major option grant
feed.summary: Exzeo Group, Inc. CEO Paresh Patel purchased 2,000 shares of common stock in an open-market transaction at $14.08 per share, increasing his direct holdings to 1,592,013 shares. Additionally, Mr. Patel holds a stock option granted in October 2021 to buy 5,000,000 common shares at an exercise price of $23.00, which vests periodically until its expiration in October 2031. This insider activity indicates confidence from the CEO in the company's future prospects.
